items.title: Tags normalization
items.description:
A high number of tags refer to the same concept with different wording or different casing/styling for the same words.  
It might be a good idea to add a normalization pipeline for the tags in each company.  
Here is a mapping from original to normalized tags in the form of a python dict (easily convertible in any other format) that might be useful as a starting point: https://github.com/FrancescoManfredi/AIRV-analysis/blob/main/tags_repl.py  
I'm the author of that mapping and this is an invite to make use of it in any way you prefer.

items.title: [遠端] [底薪 2.1-2.9M] Circle 招募 Senior/Staff 區塊鏈工程師 (Golang)
items.description:
## 團隊簡介
我們是 [Circle](https://www.circle.com/en/)，全球前五大加密貨幣 USDC 穩定幣的發行商，在前年併購了提供加密資產託管服務的台灣新創 CYBAVO 博歐科技。除了穩定幣的業務之外，Circle 在去年上線了全新的產品線：以開發者為核心的「Web3 Services」。Web3 Services 的概念類似於 AWS for Blockchain，能透過 API 整合，快速打造安全且支援各種鏈與幣種的區塊鏈服務。目前有兩個主要的產品：Programmable Wallets 以及 Smart Contract Platform，台灣團隊主要負責的就是 [Programmable Wallets](https://www.circle.com/en/programmable-wallets) 的開發。

我們目前在尋找區塊鏈工程師加入團隊：Circle is looking for a highly skilled and experienced Blockchain Engineer to join our dynamic team at Circle. As a Blockchain Engineer, you will play a critical role in connecting various blockchains to our wallet infrastructure and maintaining the underlying code. Your expertise will be instrumental in bridging the gap between our service and blockchain nodes, enabling seamless interaction between the two.

🔥 **應徵連結：[https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002](https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002)**

Circle 與 Grab 合作 ➡️ [Grab整合加密錢包、還能使用NFT優惠券！Circle執行長：10億用戶將進入Web3](https://web3plus.bnext.com.tw/article/1554)

Podcast 採訪 ➡️ [Circle 併購台灣新創、USDC 的發展戰略 ft. CYBAVO 執行長范紀鍠](https://blocktrend.substack.com/p/ep171#details)

## 工作地點
混合工作模式，可以自由選擇在家上班，或是到位於信義區的辦公室吹冷氣。
有的同事住在中南部，只有偶爾有 all-hands meeting 或是 team building 活動的時候才會上來台北！

## 工作內容

- Evaluate new blockchain technologies and their capabilities.
- Develop and validate cryptographic implementations.
- Create highly performant code that is clean, simple, maintainable, and battle-tested with test-driven development (TDD) for maximum test coverage
- Drive continuous improvement in the tech stack.

## 能力需求

- 4+ years of relevant experience 
- Expertise with cryptography, blockchain technologies, and the underlying fundamentals and mathematics.
- Technical understanding of blockchain technologies, including but not limited to BIPs, UTXO, EVM, Nakamoto Consensus, and cryptography.
- Familiar with the Golang Web Framework like Gin, Fasthttps and know the golang develop related tool like go mod, go lint, etc
- Willingness to pick up new and emerging bleeding-edge blockchain technologies
- Excellent communication skills, able to collaborate with remote teams, share ideas, and present concepts effectively.
- Extensive knowledge of secure cryptosystem operating practices is required.

## 加分能力

- Advanced degree in cryptography, computer science, mathematics, or related fields is strongly preferred.
- Experience participating or maintaining in open-source software development is highly preferred.
- Experience with writing smart contracts would be a plus.

## 面試流程

- HR 面試（約 45 分鐘）
- 線上程式測驗（約 90 分鐘）
- Technical Interview*3（60 分鐘 x 2 + 90 分鐘 x 1）
- Behavioral Interview*3 （60 分鐘 x 3）

約一個月可以完成所有面試流程

## 薪資範圍

- Base Pay Range: NT$2,170,000 - $2,975,000（月薪：180K - 247K）
- Annual Bonus Target: 12.5%
- Also Included: Equity & Benefits

## 福利/推薦項

Home office 補助、每月手機費用補助、員工健康檢查補助、彈性有薪假期（基本上不限制休假天數，只要與主管達成共識即可）
（雖然是外商，但不是 EOR，有提供薪轉跟勞健保）

## 聯絡方式
🔥 **應徵連結：[https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002](https://boards.greenhouse.io/circle/jobs/7025007002)**
Email: [riley.chang@circle.com](mailto:riley.chang@circle.com)
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yuchen227/

歡迎 LinkedIn 私訊我了解更多～

items.description:
<!--

<!--

Caso a vaga for remoto durante a pandemia deixar a linha abaixo

> Atendimento Remoto


## ITeam

Vinte anos presente no mercado, a ITeam oferece o comprometimento com o cliente.
Reunimos capital intelectual especializado por profissionais experientes e capacitados a prestar os melhores serviços nas diferentes áreas de atuação, submetidos a treinamentos constantes para estarem sempre atualizados com as melhores práticas de mercado. 
Com uma equipe multidisciplinar, a ITeam proporciona uma área de Serviços Gerenciáveis como Projetos SAP, Fábrica de Software, Fábrica de Soluções e Sustentação. Neste modelo proporcionamos Sustentação, Melhorias e Desenvolvimentos de aplicação de forma integrada.


## Local

Remoto

## Requisitos

Experiência comprovada em pesquisa de UX/Design.
Sólida experiência em pesquisa qualitativa (experiência com diferentes métodos, análises, seleção de público).
Inglês fluente (conversação).

## Desejável
Experiência em B2B.
Experiência em pesquisa quantitativa.


## Contratação

Projeto com contrato de 9 meses.
Atendimento full time em horário comercial.


## Como se candidatar

Por favor, envie um e-mail para [erika.santos@iteam.inf.br](mailto:erika.santos@iteam.inf.br) com seu currículo anexado e pretensão de taxa/hora PJ - enviar no assunto: UX Reserach - Remoto

## Labels

UX
Reserach

## Regime
PJ 

## Nível
Sênior

items.title: [Florianópolis, Tangará da Serra ou Remoto] Front-end Developer na Omega Sistemas
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

Fundada e mantida por pessoas apaixonadas por tecnologia e educação, a OMEGA é especialista em soluções para gestão educacional.

Nascida em uma época de carência de soluções no setor, a OMEGA desde sua criação vem cultivando um histórico positivo com seus casos de sucesso. [omegasistemas.net.br](omegasistemas.net.br)


## Descrição da vaga

Desenvolver, testar e manter programas de computador com a linguagem definida, baseando-se nas definições fornecidas na fase de análise de sistemas e valendo-se de métodos e técnicas adequados aos equipamentos e aplicações a que se destinam para manutenção e criação de sistemas que atendam os clientes foco, mantendo a competitividade técnica nos nossos sistemas e serviços.

## Local

Nós estamos situados no CIA primavera em Florianópolis. Temos preferência pelo presencial, mas também temos disponibilidade para remoto e semipresencial.

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
Obrigatório possuir superior completo e no mínimo 4 anos de experiência na função.

## Conhecimentos necessários:

- Conhecimento intermediário/avançado em HTML; CSS e Javascript;
- Conhecimento intermediário/avançado de orientação a objetos;
- Conhecimento intermediário/avançado em React e suas principais bibliotecas e conceitos (react-router-dom, redux, contextApi);
- Conhecimento nos principais design patterns utilizados em javascript;
- Conhecimento intermediaria em UX/UI;
- Conhecimento em ES6 intermediário;
- Conhecimento intermediário/avançado para telas responsivas;
- Nível avançado em conhecimento na stack front-end;
- Conhecimento avançado em análise de requisitos e gerenciamento de projetos;
- Conhecimento avançado em programação funcional;
- Conhecimento intermediário em devops;
- Nodejs avançado;
- Experiência com off line-first

## Benefícios

- Unimed
- Vale Alimentação
- Plano odontologico
- Day Off Aniversario
- Descontos exclusivos com Instituições
- Gympass

## Contratação

CLT/PJ a combinar

## Como se candidatar

https://vagasomegasistemas.vagas.solides.com.br/vaga/365148

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 2 dias após cada processo.
E-mail para contato em caso de não haver resposta: rh@omegasistemas.net.br

## Labels

#### Alocação
- Alocado
- Remoto

#### Regime
- CLT
- PJ

#### Nível
- Pleno
- Sênior
- Especialista

items.title: [REMOTO] Back-end Java na [TQI]
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga
Escrever código limpo, de fácil manutenção, utilizando as melhores práticas de desenvolvimento de software;
Apresentar melhorias nos sistemas existentes e garantir a qualidade nas entregas;
Ajudar e compartilhar sua experiência com os membros da equipe.

## Local
⏰ Horário comercial, 8h diárias, Segunda a Sexta;
🎒 Trabalho 100% remoto.

## Benefícios
**Lista de Benefícios:**
- Gympass para você e mais 3 dependentes;
- Seguro de Vida
- Acesso ilimitado a plataforma Udemy para cursos e capacitação;
- Parceria com descontos em faculdades e escolas de idiomas.
- Agenda de eventos internos e externos voltados para o seu Desenvolvimento Profissional e Pessoal.

**Pra quem é CLT:**
- VA/VR: R$1012 /mês no cartão Flash
- Auxilio Home Office e bônus para melhoria do seu espaço de trabalho;
- Convênio Médico Apartamento e Odontológico sem coparticipação e integralmente custeado pela empresa para o Titular;
- PLR.

**Pra contratos PJ:**
- Contratos por prazo indeterminado e não por projeto
- 20 dias de bônus para descanso remunerado;
- Clube de Benefícios Lincard
- DIT - Seguro Profissional (Auxilio financeiro em caso de afastamento do trabalho por motivo de saúde ou por acidente).

## Requisitos

#### Obrigatórios:
Java;
Kotlin;
Modelagem de APIs (Rest/ SOAP);
Experiência em projetos Agile (Scrum/ Kanban);
Springboot;
CI/CD;
Jenkins;
Oracle / MySQL / Postgres / SQL Server.

## Contratação
- PJ ou CLT

## Nossa empresa
Que incrível que você está aqui e tem interesse em fazer parte dos nossos times. A TQI é feita para você, sim você que quer ousar sem receio e vivenciar grandes desafios. Você fará parte de times multidisciplinares e de alta performance, em um ambiente descontraído, dinâmico e colaborativo que te proporcionará constantes aprendizados e desenvolvimento.

Aqui, você encontrará liberdade e autonomia, atuando com metodologias ágeis em projetos inspiradores. Sua voz e sua contribuição são muito importantes para nós, para a construção dos nossos produtos e também para nossas tomadas de decisões.

Não tenha receio em pedir ajuda e compartilhar novas ideias, é assim que conseguimos transformar insights em soluções extraordinárias, somos um time e juntos respiramos inovação.

E ainda vamos além do código, aqui você aprende e também tem a oportunidade de ensinar, construir e evoluir, na TQI você será protagonista da sua carreira.

Conheça mais sobre nossa empresa: https://www.tqi.com.br/

## Como se candidatar
Por favor envie um email para **talentos@tqi.com.br** com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: "Java - GitHub" ou pelo Whatsapp no link https://contate.me/lais_tqi

## Tempo médio de feedbacks
Temos um fluxo de contratação contínua, e TODOS candidatos recebem feedback de forma contínua durante o processo seletivo.

## Labels

#### Alocação

- Remoto

#### Regime
- CLT
- PJ

#### Nível
- Pleno
- Sênior
- Especialista

items.title: [REMOTO] WordPress Developer Senior
items.description:
**Descrição da vaga**
Estamos em busca de um Desenvolvedor WordPress qualificado, com experiência comprovada em PHP, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, e conhecimento avançado em features e plugins de wordpress. É essencial ter habilidade na customização de temas e plugins, além de experiência com ferramentas de construção de páginas. Conhecimentos em MySQL, otimização de sites para alta performance, segurança web, e práticas de SEO são fundamentais. Apreciaremos experiência com Git, APIs RESTful para integração com outros serviços e sistemas, e um forte entendimento de acessibilidade na web e padrões web.

**Local**
Remoto

**Benefícios**
Salário competitivo
Oportunidades de desenvolvimento profissional em uma startup em crescimento rápido
Ambiente colaborativo e inovador de trabalho remoto
Horário flexível e liberdade de localização
Contrato PJ

**Contratação**
PJ

**Como se candidatar**
Por favor envie um email para [stiflerandballer@gmail.com](mailto:stiflerandballer@gmail.com) com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: WordPress Developer Senior

**Alocação**
Remoto

**Regime**
PJ

**Nível**
Sênior
Especialista

items.title: 🛠 Senior Full-Stack Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Full Stack Engineer, you'll be key to building and maintaining our innovative web applications, working across both front-end and back-end to ensure a robust, seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Full-Stack Engineer**

1. Work with our tech stack comprising JavaScript, React, Material UI (MUI), Node.js, and other languages, while swiftly adapting to JavaScript if your expertise lies elsewhere.
2. Handle SQL-based databases, mainly PostgreSQL, using ORMs to interact effectively.
3. Utilize containers, K8, and AWS ECS for reliable and efficient application deployment.
4. Develop mobile interfaces using React Native.
5. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams through the full development cycle, from API design to deployment. This includes code reviews, developing reusable code, and collaborating with various engineering teams.
6. Work with our design team to address user pain points and drive improvements in engineering standards and processes. You'll also develop new tools for internal teams and take ownership of your work.
7. Design, build, and maintain APIs, iterating to enhance functionality.
8. Troubleshoot and debug software systems, integrate new components as needed, and address production issues.
9. Launch new markets, features, or products regularly, staying agile to meet market demands.

## **What You Bring**

1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Advanced degrees preferred.
2. Proficiency in front-end technologies like JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and a modern framework such as React.
3. Solid understanding of back-end development using Node.js, Python, or similar.
4. Experience with PostgreSQL and SQL Server databases, including data modeling and query optimization.
5. Familiarity with version control systems (Git), agile methodologies, and CI/CD pipelines.
6. Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.
7. Excellent problem-solving skills with an ability to debug complex software issues.
8. Strong communication and collaboration skills with a team-oriented mindset.

By joining us, you'll not only be a part of a dynamic, innovative environment, but you'll also have the opportunity to grow your technical skills, contribute directly to the success of our projects, and make a tangible impact in our rapidly evolving field. Our inclusive culture encourages collaboration and continuous learning, ensuring that you stay abreast of the latest trends and technologies, broadening your professional horizons, and furthering your career.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)
items.excerpt: **Who We Are** We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT. Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in...

items.title: 🛠 Senior Back-End Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Back-End Engineer, your pivotal role will encompass the design of a dynamic and scalable back-end architecture optimized for performance, and positioned to accommodate future product developments.

## **Your Journey as a Back-End Engineer**

- Our back-end primarily leverages **TypeScript (Node.js)**.
    - Proficiency in TypeScript is vital
    - However, applicants with experience in other languages like C, C++, C#, Java, Ruby, or GoLang, who can adapt to TypeScript swiftly, are welcomed.
- Our databases are SQL-based, primarily utilizing Postgres. We use ORMs for effective database interaction and management.
- Our production infrastructure thrives on containers, K8, and AWS ECS.
- Our work environment values teamwork.
    - Join hands with a cross-functional team throughout the development cycle, from designing to deploying APIs, SDKs, and other services or tooling.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Craft reusable and testable code for services and libraries that can be maintained seamlessly.
    - Collaborate with engineers across various departments to create remarkable features.
    - Work in unison with our product team to identify and tackle user pain points.
    - Champion improvements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop innovative tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and responsibility for your work.
- API development is a key facet of your role.
    - Design, build, and maintain APIs, services, and systems.
    - Create new APIs or enhance existing ones for our users.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the launch of new markets, features, or products regularly.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or an internship in a similar role.
3. Proficiency in web frameworks, especially JavaScript and Node.js.
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

In this role, you'll have the opportunity to shape the backbone of our software, empowering us to drive forward with innovative product advancements. Are you ready to take the lead?

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

items.title: 🛠 Senior Front-End Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As our Front-End Engineer, you are tasked with the development of engaging, intuitive, and visually compelling user interfaces for our web app product. You will work in close collaboration with designers and back-end engineers, and the marketing team, transmuting design mockups, user stories, and wireframes into high-quality code, thereby ensuring an immersive and seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Front-End Engineer**

- Our front-end ecosystem is fortified with **TypeScript.**
    - React, and Material UI (MUI)
    - React Native for mobile front-end development.
- As front-end engineers, we take pride in precise design execution, valuing pixel-perfect implementation and employing Figma to maintain alignment with original designs.
- Collaborative work culture is our ethos.
    - Work in tandem with a cross-functional team through the development cycle, from front-end frameworks, and front-end service design to deployment.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Write clean, reusable, and testable code for easy maintenance by yourself and your fellow software engineers.
    - Partner with engineers from various teams to create user-delighting features.
    - Collaborate with our design team to understand and address user pain points.
    - Drive enhancements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop new tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and accountability for your work.
- API integration is a critical part of your role.
    - Integrate APIs according to spec with front-end frameworks.
- Build, mange, and reuse UI components effectively.
    - Keep UI components organized.
    - Reuse UI component to maximize efficiency, robustness, and user experience.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the regular launch of new markets, features, or products.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or a similar role internship.
3. Proficiency in web development frameworks, especially JavaScript, React, and Material UI (MUI).
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

With your craftsmanship, you'll help to shape the user interface of our software, driving our mission forward through stunning visual experiences. Are you ready to create?

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

items.title: 🛠 Senior Generative AI Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

Join our dynamic team at the cutting edge of generative AI technology. As a Generative AI Research Engineer, you'll spearhead advancements through innovative research and engineering solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams and the global AI community to shape the future of Generative AI.

## **Your Role and Responsibilities**

- **Engineering and Research**
    - Lead the design, implementation, and training of large-scale generative AI models, emphasizing video generation, transformation, and editing.
    - Conduct groundbreaking research in Generative AI, exploring new AI modeling techniques and vision-and-language integrations.
    - Stay abreast of the latest deep learning advancements and integrate this knowledge to drive company innovation.
- **Collaboration and Mentorship**
    - Work closely with a talented team to define use cases, innovate, and establish evaluation methodologies.
    - Foster a culture of growth by mentoring Ph.D. and Master's students, emphasizing knowledge sharing.
- **Communication and Dissemination**
    - Share research findings through publications in top-tier journals and presentations at leading conferences.
    - Transfer and open-source developed technologies to relevant product teams, amplifying our impact in the AI sector.

## **Technical Proficiency**

- **Programming Expertise**
    - Mastery in Python and C++, enriched by a profound understanding of leading deep-learning frameworks.
- **Data Science Skills**
    - Solid capabilities in data science, including hands-on experience with large datasets and application of machine learning technologies.

## **Qualifications and Experience**

- **Education**
    - No prior knowledge or experience in AI is required.
    - B.S, M.S., or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related domain.
- **Professional Background**
    - No prior profession or educational background in AI is required.
    - Demonstrated research excellence, including publications in renowned journals and conferences.
- **Communication Prowess**
    - Stellar communication and presentation abilities, adept at articulating research insights to diverse audiences.
- **Preferred Attributes**
    - A Master's or Bachelor's degree in a pertinent field, enriched by hands-on experience in practical applications.
    - Experience in deploying research into production and familiarity with large-scale distributed systems.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

## **Your Journey as a Back-End Engineer**

- Our back-end primarily leverages **TypeScript (Node.js)**.
    - Proficiency in TypeScript is vital
    - However, applicants with experience in other languages like C, C++, C#, Java, Ruby, or GoLang, who can adapt to TypeScript swiftly, are welcomed.
- Our databases are SQL-based, primarily utilizing Postgres. We use ORMs for effective database interaction and management.
- Our production infrastructure thrives on containers, K8, and AWS ECS.
- Our work environment values teamwork.
    - Join hands with a cross-functional team throughout the development cycle, from designing to deploying APIs, SDKs, and other services or tooling.
    - Engage in code reviews to elevate your work and that of your colleagues.
    - Craft reusable and testable code for services and libraries that can be maintained seamlessly.
    - Collaborate with engineers across various departments to create remarkable features.
    - Work in unison with our product team to identify and tackle user pain points.
    - Champion improvements in engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
    - Develop innovative tools for internal teams.
    - Embrace ownership and responsibility for your work.
- API development is a key facet of your role.
    - Design, build, and maintain APIs, services, and systems.
    - Create new APIs or enhance existing ones for our users.
- Troubleshooting and debugging are indispensable skills.
    - Investigate, debug, and upgrade existing software systems, including the development and integration of new components or automation pipelines as needed.
    - Address production issues across services.
- Engage in the launch of new markets, features, or products regularly.

## **What You Bring**

1. Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
2. Five or more years of coding experience or an internship in a similar role.
3. Proficiency in web frameworks, especially JavaScript and Node.js.
4. Experience with databases like PostgreSQL and SQL Server.
5. Familiarity with quality control testing using tools such as QUnit, Mocha, Jasmine, or RSpec.

In this role, you'll have the opportunity to shape the backbone of our software, empowering us to drive forward with innovative product advancements. Are you ready to take the lead?

items.title: 🛠 Senior Full-Stack Engineer (🇺🇸 Full-Remote) 🚀
items.description:
**Who We Are**

We are a rapidly growing software technology startup from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT.

Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago.

As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

🍏 New Graduates welcomed to apply! We have positions for all experience levels.

🇺🇸 Non-Native English speaking team members welcomed. Only basic reading English ability needed.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

As a Full Stack Engineer, you'll be key to building and maintaining our innovative web applications, working across both front-end and back-end to ensure a robust, seamless user experience.

## **Your Journey as a Full-Stack Engineer**

1. Work with our tech stack comprising JavaScript, React, Material UI (MUI), Node.js, and other languages, while swiftly adapting to JavaScript if your expertise lies elsewhere.
2. Handle SQL-based databases, mainly PostgreSQL, using ORMs to interact effectively.
3. Utilize containers, K8, and AWS ECS for reliable and efficient application deployment.
4. Develop mobile interfaces using React Native.
5. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams through the full development cycle, from API design to deployment. This includes code reviews, developing reusable code, and collaborating with various engineering teams.
6. Work with our design team to address user pain points and drive improvements in engineering standards and processes. You'll also develop new tools for internal teams and take ownership of your work.
7. Design, build, and maintain APIs, iterating to enhance functionality.
8. Troubleshoot and debug software systems, integrate new components as needed, and address production issues.
9. Launch new markets, features, or products regularly, staying agile to meet market demands.

## **What You Bring**

1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Advanced degrees preferred.
2. Proficiency in front-end technologies like JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and a modern framework such as React.
3. Solid understanding of back-end development using Node.js, Python, or similar.
4. Experience with PostgreSQL and SQL Server databases, including data modeling and query optimization.
5. Familiarity with version control systems (Git), agile methodologies, and CI/CD pipelines.
6. Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.
7. Excellent problem-solving skills with an ability to debug complex software issues.
8. Strong communication and collaboration skills with a team-oriented mindset.

By joining us, you'll not only be a part of a dynamic, innovative environment, but you'll also have the opportunity to grow your technical skills, contribute directly to the success of our projects, and make a tangible impact in our rapidly evolving field. Our inclusive culture encourages collaboration and continuous learning, ensuring that you stay abreast of the latest trends and technologies, broadening your professional horizons, and furthering your career.

[APPLY NOW](https://linktr.ee/growaha)

items.title: [Remoto] Full-Stack Developer - Flutter and Spring Framework na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/fullstack-developer-flutter-and-spring-framework-040213705?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) com o pop-up personalizado de candidatura. 👋

Fala galera, blz?

Temos 2 vagas para Fullstack Developer.

Não procuramos especialista em uma linguagem de programação. Precisamos de pessoas que saibam resolver o problema do cliente. Muitas vezes o cliente nos passa uma informação de uma forma, mas precisamos nos colocar no lugar do cliente para conseguir entender, e pensar em uma forma em que pode ser até melhor do que ele nos propôs. 

Logo, a capacidade em resolver problemas é muito importante. Não basta só sabermos programar, precisamos saber como cada funcionalidade pode impactar na vida do usuário. Precisamos saber um pouquinho de cada coisa, isso aí é um diferencial.

Somos uma pequena empresa, que está engatinhando no mercado, mas temos ajudado milhares de usuários a crescer, de forma que desenvolvemos ferramentas que facilitam o dia a dia de muitos. Nossos produtos são baratos, queremos ajudar muitos clientes, e ganhar no volume de vendas.

Então você precisará saber um pouquinho de cada coisa: Flutter, Figma (UX/UI), Java e Spring Framework, React.js e Next.js.

  • O formato de horário está Full Time, mas podemos avaliar em outros formatos (4h e 6h).
  • Informe sua pretenção salarial, pois também é um fator determinante.
  • Responda o máximo de perguntas e testes que puder! Seja sincero e não cole!
## TUA AGENDA SERVICO DE TECNOLOGIA LTDA:

Temos um aplicativo "carro chefe", que é o Tua Agenda!

Aplicativo muito usado em salões de beleza e afins.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Flutter - Java - Spring Framework - Preact - PostgreSQL - Figma ## Local: 100% Remoto ## Requisitos: - Flutter - Java - Spring Framework - Figma ## Diferenciais: - React - Next.js - Node - iReport ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Full-Stack Developer - Flutter and Spring Framework na TUA AGENDA SERVICO DE TECNOLOGIA LTDA](https://coodesh.com/jobs/fullstack-developer-flutter-and-spring-framework-040213705?utm_source=github&utm_medium=FlutterComunidadeBR-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Full-Stack
